title: ux-Layout
text: ux-Layout This section provides description for the logical UX component and entity widget ux-Layout properties. Figure 1. ux-Layout widget - preview 1 Figure 2. ux-Layout widget - preview 2 Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-Layout Maps to physical widget: uxCompLayout (For component widget) uxEntLayout (For entity widget) Default definition: ux-Layout=uxCompLayout() ux-Layout=uxEntLayout() Supported triggers: - Use for: Arrange top-level or direct child elements, such as entities and labels, in a vertical or horizontal layout, and use it as a main or contained DSP.
